overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2, featuring an Ultramarine in blue power armor navigating a dark gothic industrial complex. The character moves from an interior cathedral space up through staircases and corridors to an exterior industrial platform, encountering other Space Marines and a Chaplain before exploring a massive industrial yard with heavy machinery and armored vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral interior with checkered flooring

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up a stone staircase in heavy power armor, moving from the cathedral floor toward upper levels

notable_agents.action: Space Marine in blue armor standing guard near the stairs
Space Marine in blue armor standing at attention

entered.detail: massive stone archway with intricate gothic detailing and dark metal fixtures
large metal braziers with orange flames providing warm light against the cool stone
black and white checkered marble flooring pattern
wide stone stairs with metal railings ascending to upper levels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit gothic cathedral interior with checkered marble floors. The player character, an Ultramarine in blue power armor, ascends a wide stone staircase. Other Space Marines stand guard in the background near burning braziers that cast flickering orange light against the cool stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor leading to exterior balcony

events.description: approaching the balcony doorway with visible exterior light and industrial vista beyond

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow metal corridors with yellow wall lighting, heading toward an exit

notable_agents.action: Space Marine visible through doorway ahead, standing on the balcony

entered.detail: dark metal panel walls with riveted seams and industrial gothic detailing
vertical yellow glowing lights mounted on the corridor walls
perforated metal flooring with geometric patterns
large arched exit leading to exterior industrial platform

segments.scene_description: The character moves through narrow metal corridors with yellow artificial lighting and perforated metal flooring. The walls feature dark industrial gothic detailing. The segment ends as the character approaches a large arched doorway leading to an exterior balcony with a visible industrial vista beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior balcony overlooking massive industrial complex

events.description: exits the corridor onto an exterior balcony revealing a vast industrial landscape below
slows to approach and interact with the Chaplain standing on the balcony

agents.ego_description: walking along the balcony railing, pausing to observe the industrial vista and interact with a Chaplain

notable_agents.action: Chaplain in black robes with skull mask and crozius staff, standing guard and observing the industrial area
Space Marine with red helmet standing at the balcony edge looking outward

entered.detail: ornate metal railing with gothic patterns overlooking the industrial complex
massive sprawling industrial complex with towers, pipes, and distant lights under a dark sky
tall industrial spires and structures visible in the background haze

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an exterior balcony with ornate metal railings, revealing a breathtaking view of a massive industrial complex stretching into the distance under a dark sky. The character approaches a Chaplain in black robes with a skull mask who stands observing the vista. Other Space Marines are positioned along the balcony edge. The lighting shifts to a mix of interior yellow sconces and the cool blue ambient light from the exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial platform with heavy machinery and parked vehicles

events.description: resumes walking along the industrial platform, moving away from the balcony area

agents.ego_description: moving through the industrial platform area, passing machinery and storage containers while the Chaplain follows

notable_agents.action: Chaplain walking alongside, following the player character across the platform

entered.detail: large industrial structures, pipes, and mechanical equipment with red warning lights
wide metal platform with perforated flooring and yellow safety markings
stacks of metal barrels and industrial containers
large industrial vehicles and transports parked along the platform edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves off the balcony onto a wide industrial metal platform surrounded by massive machinery, storage barrels, and parked vehicles. The Chaplain follows alongside. The environment is open to the dark sky above, with industrial floodlights illuminating the scene. Red warning lights blink on distant machinery, and the platform features yellow safety markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: armored vehicle staging area with large tank

events.description: ascends metal stairs leading up to the large armored tank

agents.ego_description: walking up metal stairs toward a massive armored tank, with other Space Marines gathered around the vehicle

notable_agents.action: Space Marine standing near the tank's treads, observing the approach
Space Marine in blue armor standing guard at the tank's entrance ramp

entered.detail: massive blue and white armored vehicle with glowing lights, heavy treads, and gothic detailing
metal staircase with railings leading up to the tank's entrance platform
bright yellow floodlights mounted on poles illuminating the tank area

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching a massive armored tank with blue and white markings. The character ascends metal stairs toward the vehicle while other Space Marines stand guard nearby. Bright industrial floodlights illuminate the tank, and its heavy treads and gothic architectural details are visible. The Chaplain remains nearby as the character moves toward the vehicle's entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the solemn interior of a gothic cathedral into a sprawling, open-air industrial complex. It begins with an Ultramarine ascending a wide stone staircase across checkered marble floors, where burning braziers cast flickering orange light against the cool architecture. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into narrow metal corridors with yellow artificial lighting and perforated flooring before opening through a large arched doorway onto an exterior balcony. The view then expands to reveal a massive industrial vista under a dark sky, where the camera passes a skull-masked Chaplain and other Space Marines positioned along ornate railings. Finally, the movement leads off the balcony and across a wide metal platform filled with heavy machinery and blinking red warning lights, ending as the character ascends stairs toward a massive armored tank illuminated by bright industrial floodlights.
